# Vendor Portal — Backend

## Current status
Vendor Portal backend is served by the Application monolith:
`Application/backend/src/modules/softwarevendor/`

API runs on port 3000. Vendor panel frontend on port 3006.

## Modules (future extraction)
module-manager/, packages/, licenses/, partners/, wallet/, ai-tokens/,
version-control/, analytics/

## Future port: 3003
